Plaintiff Western Plywood, Inc. A California Corporation'S Application For Right To Attach Order For Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WESTERN PLYWOOD, INC.'S Application For Right To Attach Order For Writ Of Attachment is denied, without prejudice. Plaintiff failed to file a supporting memorandum with its application. (CRC 3.1113(a).) An application for right to attach order is not one of the enumerated exceptions to this rule. (CRC 3.1114(a).) Notwithstanding this procedural error, the motion is denied. Plaintiff admits that this action is subject to an arbitration agreement. (Brownstein Decl., 3; Woerner Decl., Exhibit A, 14.) In its application, Plaintiff has not demonstrated that the award to which Plaintiff may be entitled to may be rendered ineffectual without provisional relief. (CCP 1281.8(b).) Order signed after hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
